description: S.H.I.E.L.D. arrives at Ivanov's abandoned hideout in Nome, Alaska. Coulson, Daisy, Mack, and the team investigate a room plastered with images and evidence of Coulson's missions over the years. Daisy finds a photo of a Russian mining facility owned by Ivanov, which Coulson recognizes from his past. This discovery points the team toward their next destination.
